caption: A televised news broadcast from "NEWS 18 इंडिया" features a press conference held under the banner of the "NATIONAL DEVELOPMENTAL INCLUSIVE ALLIANCE" in "NEW DELHI" on "19 DECEMBER 2023". A panel of men in formal and traditional Indian attire, including white kurtas and vests, are seated behind a long white table. The scene remains largely static, though the on-screen graphics shift. The top frames feature a red banner reading "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and a profile of "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" alongside his photo. The bottom frames change the top headline to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". A consistent red ticker at the bottom reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: सबका साथ सबका विकास का मंत्र". Small portrait photos and names of officials, such as "संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार", appear on the right side, while other names like "विजय सिन्हा" are visible on the left.
